title: Correctional Officer

rationales.taskAutomation: Supervising incarcerated people, physical security, and in-person response to incidents dominate the role and cannot be automated end-to-end.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted surveillance and behavior-flagging tools exist in some large facilities but are far from a standard toolchain.
rationales.adoption: Corrections departments are among the most conservative and underfunded public employers, slowing even proven tool adoption.
rationales.agenticExposure: The job is physical presence and security response in an unstructured, high-risk environment that agents cannot reach.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 33-3012, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Facility surveillance and behavior-monitoring system literacy

insight: One of the most physically-grounded roles in this index; AI's reach is limited to logging and monitoring at the margins.
